getgenv.label: getgenv

getgenv_value.label: getgenv_value
getgenv_value.description: Gets a specific value from the global environment.

isdbgpresent.label: isdbgpresent
isdbgpresent.description: Checks if a debugger is currently attached to the process.

isdebuggerpresent.label: isdebuggerpresent
isdebuggerpresent.description: Alias for isdbgpresent(). Checks for debugger presence.

getobjects.label: getobjects
getobjects.description: Loads and returns objects from a Roblox asset ID or URL.

getinstances.label: getinstances
getinstances.description: Returns all instances in the game, optionally filtered by class name.

get_nil_instances.label: get_nil_instances

getloadedmodules.label: getloadedmodules

gethiddenproperty.label: gethiddenproperty

sethiddenproperty.label: sethiddenproperty

gethiddenproperties.label: gethiddenproperties
gethiddenproperties.description: Returns a list of all hidden properties available on an instance.

setscriptable.label: setscriptable
setscriptable.description: Sets whether a property can be accessed via scripts.

getidentity.label: getidentity

getthreadcontext.label: getthreadcontext
getthreadcontext.description: Alias for getidentity(). Gets thread context level.

getcontext.label: getcontext
getcontext.description: Alias for getidentity(). Gets current context level.

setidentity.label: setidentity

setthreadcontext.label: setthreadcontext
setthreadcontext.description: Alias for setidentity(). Sets thread context level.

setcontext.label: setcontext

getscriptclosure.label: getscriptclosure

get_calling_script.label: get_calling_script

getcurrentscript.label: getcurrentscript

getmenv.label: getmenv

getcallbackvalue.label: getcallbackvalue
getcallbackvalue.description: Gets the callback value from a script or function.

loadstring.label: loadstring

dostring.label: dostring
dostring.description: Compiles and executes a Lua string immediately.

lz4compress.label: lz4compress

getconnections.label: getconnections
